/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/qagame.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,qagamex86_64.so -o qagamex86_64.so CMakeFiles/qagame.dir/src/game/ai_cast.c.o
